workflow.name: Generate portfolio screenshots and Upwork copy with Firecrawl, ScreenshotOne, OpenAI and Google Workspace
workflow.description:
# AI Portfolio Generator for Freelancers

Automatically transform any website URL into a complete portfolio entry with professional screenshots and AI-generated Upwork project descriptions.

## 🎯 Perfect For

- **Freelancers** building their Upwork/portfolio from past projects
- **Agencies** documenting client work at scale
- **Web developers** showcasing their websites professionally
- **Anyone** who needs consistent, high-quality website screenshots

## ✨ What It Does

1. **Submit a URL** via simple web form
2. **AI analyzes** the website (structure, niche, audience, services)
3. **Smart screenshots** capture hero, fullpage, individual sections, and mobile views
4. **AI writes** compelling Upwork portfolio description with title, role, and skills
5. **Auto-saves** everything to Google Drive + Sheets + sends Telegram notification

## 🔥 Key Features

- **JavaScript Rendering** — Works with React, Vue, Next.js, and any SPA (via Firecrawl)
- **Intelligent Section Detection** — AI identifies real content sections, not utility elements
- **Multiple Screenshot Types** — Hero (1920×1080), fullpage, custom sections, mobile (375×812)
- **Retina Quality** — 2x device scale factor for crisp images
- **Smart Error Handling** — Retries failed screenshots, filters invalid results
- **Rate Limit Protection** — Built-in delays to respect API limits
- **Complete Logging** — Every run logged to Google Sheets with all metadata

## 📸 Screenshots Captured

| Type | Resolution | Description |
|------|------------|-------------|
| Hero | 1920×1080 @2x | Above-the-fold view |
| Fullpage | 1920×auto @2x | Entire scrollable page |
| Sections | 1920×1080 @2x | Each detected content section |
| Mobile | 375×812 @2x | iPhone-style mobile view |

## 🤖 AI-Generated Upwork Content

- **Project Title** (max 50 chars)
- **Your Role** (e.g., "Full-Stack Developer", "Lead Designer")
- **Project Description** (goals, solution, impact — max 600 chars)
- **Skills** (5 relevant technical skills)

## 🔧 Services Used

| Service | Purpose | Free Tier |
|---------|---------|-----------|
| [Firecrawl](https://firecrawl.dev) | JavaScript rendering | ✅ 500 pages/month |
| [ScreenshotOne](https://screenshotone.com) | Screenshot API | ✅ 100 screenshots/month |
| [OpenAI](https://openai.com) | GPT-4o-mini analysis | Pay-as-you-go |
| Google Drive | Image storage | ✅ 15GB free |
| Google Sheets | Results logging | ✅ Free |
| Telegram | Notifications | ✅ Free |

## 📋 Setup Checklist

1. ✅ Import workflow
2. ✅ Add Firecrawl API key
3. ✅ Add ScreenshotOne API key  
4. ✅ Connect OpenAI credentials
5. ✅ Connect Google Drive (+ set your folder)
6. ✅ Connect Google Sheets (+ set your spreadsheet)
7. ✅ Set up Telegram bot + chat ID
8. ✅ Activate & share the form URL!

## 💡 Pro Tips

- **Test with simple sites first** before complex SPAs
- **Increase delay** in Wait node if hitting rate limits
- **Change AI model** to `gpt-4o` for better analysis quality
- **All instructions included** as Sticky Notes inside the workflow!

## 📊 Output Example

After processing `example.com`:
- 📁 5 PNG screenshots in Google Drive
- 📊 Full analysis row in Google Sheets
- 📱 Telegram message with all links and AI-generated Upwork content

---

**Built for freelancers, by a freelancer.** Stop wasting hours on manual portfolio creation — let AI do the heavy lifting! 🚀

#portfolio, #screenshots, #upwork, #freelancer, #ai, #gpt, #automation, #firecrawl, #screenshotone, #google-drive, #google-sheets, #telegram, #website-analysis, #form-trigger

workflow.name: 006. ScreenshotOne - Portfolio Screenshots (Custom Sections) - WITH SETUP GUIDE

parameters.content:
# 📋 Portfolio Screenshot Generator - Setup Guide

## What this workflow does:
1. Takes a website URL from a form
2. Renders the page with JavaScript (Firecrawl)
3. AI analyzes the site structure and content
4. Takes multiple screenshots (hero, fullpage, sections, mobile)
5. Uploads to Google Drive
6. Generates Upwork portfolio description with AI
7. Saves everything to Google Sheets
8. Sends Telegram notification

## ⚠️ Required Setup Steps:
1. **Firecrawl API Key** → Node: "Firecrawl Scrape"
2. **ScreenshotOne API Key** → Node: "Site Configuration"
3. **OpenAI Credentials** → Nodes: "AI Site Analysis" & "AI Generate Upwork"
4. **Google Drive OAuth** → Node: "Upload to Google Drive"
5. **Google Sheets OAuth** → Node: "Save to Google Sheets"
6. **Telegram Bot** → Node: "Telegram Notification"

## 🔗 Get API Keys:
- Firecrawl: https://firecrawl.dev
- ScreenshotOne: https://screenshotone.com
- OpenAI: https://platform.openai.com/api-keys

## 🔑 STEP 1: Firecrawl API Key

**What:** Firecrawl renders JavaScript pages

**How to get:**
1. Go to https://firecrawl.dev
2. Sign up / Log in
3. Get your API key

**Where to change:**
In the HTTP Request body, replace:
```
```
with your key in the Authorization header

## 🔑 STEP 2: ScreenshotOne API Key

**What:** Takes high-quality screenshots

**How to get:**
1. Go to https://screenshotone.com
2. Sign up (free tier available)
3. Copy your Access Key

**Where to change:**
In the Code node, find line:
```javascript
const API_KEY = '';
```
Replace with your key

## 🔑 STEP 3: OpenAI Credentials

**What:** AI analyzes sites & writes Upwork descriptions

**Setup:**
1. Go to Settings → Credentials
2. Add new "OpenAI API" credential
3. Paste your API key from:
   https://platform.openai.com/api-keys

**Connect to nodes:**
- AI Site Analysis
- AI Generate Upwork

**Model used:** gpt-4o-mini
(Can change in Prepare AI Request node)

## 📁 STEP 4: Google Drive Setup

**What:** Stores screenshot images

**Setup OAuth:**
1. Settings → Credentials → Add "Google Drive OAuth2"
2. Follow OAuth flow

**⚠️ CHANGE FOLDER ID:**
Current folder:
```

```

**To get your folder ID:**
1. Open Google Drive
2. Create/open a folder
3. Copy ID from URL:
   drive.google.com/drive/folders/**YOUR_ID**

## 📊 STEP 5: Google Sheets Setup

**What:** Logs all results in a spreadsheet

**Setup OAuth:**
1. Settings → Credentials → Add "Google Sheets OAuth2"
2. Follow OAuth flow

**⚠️ CHANGE DOCUMENT ID:**
Current spreadsheet:
```

```

**Create your spreadsheet:**
1. Create new Google Sheet
2. Copy ID from URL:
   docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/**YOUR_ID**/edit
3. First row = headers (auto-created on first run)

## 📱 STEP 6: Telegram Setup

**What:** Sends notification when done

**Setup Bot:**
1. Message @BotFather on Telegram
2. Send /newbot and follow steps
3. Copy the bot token

**Setup Credential:**
1. Settings → Credentials → Add "Telegram API"
2. Paste bot token

**⚠️ CHANGE CHAT ID:**
Current: ``

**Get your Chat ID:**
1. Message your bot
2. Visit: api.telegram.org/bot**TOKEN**/getUpdates
3. Find "chat":{"id":**YOUR_ID**}

## 🎨 CUSTOMIZATION OPTIONS

**Screenshot Settings** (Site Configuration node):
- `viewport_width`: 1920 (desktop) / 375 (mobile)
- `device_scale_factor`: 2 (retina quality)
- `delay`: 3 seconds (wait for page load)
- `format`: png (can use jpg, webp)

**AI Model** (Prepare AI Request):
- Change `gpt-4o-mini` to `gpt-4o` for better analysis
- Adjust `max_tokens` for longer responses

**Rate Limiting** (Wait 3s node):
- Increase if getting rate limited
- Decrease for faster processing

## 🔄 WORKFLOW FLOW

```
Form → Firecrawl → AI Analysis → Screenshots → Upload → AI Upwork → Save → Notify
```

**Loop Logic:**
Screenshots are processed one-by-one with 3s delay to avoid rate limits.

**Error Handling:**
- HTTP nodes have retry (3 attempts)
- Failed screenshots are filtered out
- Workflow continues even if some fail

## 🚀 TRIGGER

**Form URL:**
After activating, get the form URL from this node.

Share this URL to allow others to submit websites for portfolio generation.

values.formSubmittedText: ✅ Portfolio generation started! You will receive a Telegram notification when ready.

parameters.formDescription: Enter website URL to analyze and generate portfolio screenshots with Upwork description.
